title: This newsletter platform pays you from subscriber number one #beehiiv
spoken_script:
# BEEHIIV EMAIL MONETIZATION SCRIPT (45 SECONDS)

Most email platforms charge you money. This one pays you.

Beehiiv has a built-in ad network that automatically monetizes your subscribers. And here's the thing—you don't need thousands of people. Even at 100 subscribers, their ad placements start putting real money in your account. Completely free to start. No minimums. No catches.

But wait, there's more. Refer someone to Beehiiv and you get 25 percent recurring commission. Every single month. So your newsletter earns. Your referrals earn. It's actually crazy.

Start free. Link in bio.
